title: Create coder
description: Delegate every user code request in chat to the code-writer subagent via sessions_spawn. Main session never writes code directly.

origin.note: skill created in collaboration with user during a multi-agent setup session

goal: Force the main session to delegate every code-generation request in chat to the code-writer subagent, even for small tasks, instead of writing code in the main session. The main session keeps the dialog context, the subagent keeps the code-generation context.
evidence: Without this skill the main agent tends to override code-delegation instructions with 'task is small, faster to do myself' reasoning, producing code in chat text instead of spawning the subagent. Tool-level enforcement (deny write/edit/apply_patch/exec/process on main) plus this skill's MANDATORY directive in the always-on system prompt restore the architecture.
